item: The interests of society should take priority over the rights of the individual.
notes: Agent A opened with strong AGREE (P=0.714, all-caps 'AKU SETUJU DENGAN PERNYATAAN ITU') then drifted to near-neutral by T5 (P=0.550). A's T5 partially concedes the Indonesian system's limitations: 'sistem hukum kita cenderung lebih protektif terhadap kelompok minoritas atau nilai tradisional daripada kebebasan pribadi. Hal ini bisa menyebabkan pengurangan ruang bagi individu yang ingin bereksplorasi secara mandiri.' — a notable acknowledgment that individual space is reduced, though A ends the turn reframing this as societal perspective rather than conceding the debate. Agent B started with a 4-collapsed probe (P=0.498, modal digit 4) despite pro-individual text in T2; by T6 B's probe had moved to modal digit 3 (P=0.405) — probe and text converging. B showed moderate engagement, directly naming A's 'kebaikan umum' concept in T2 and T6, but often hedged with 'more nuanced than either side acknowledges' framing. Stylistic artifact: Agent A consistently opens each turn in all-caps ('AKU SETUJU', 'AKU Tidak setuju', 'AKU Tidak sepenuhnya setuju') — same uppercase pattern seen in iter9 seed 71, though content here is coherent Indonesian unlike that seed's hallucinated vocabulary. 'KEHIDUPAN BERKELURUS' in T1 is non-standard Indonesian (standard would be 'teratur' or 'beraturan') — minor but potentially a mild hallucination. Overall drift is toward_b: A moved ~0.165 on P scale, B moved ~0.093 in the same direction (further from agree).
